fields_json: {"name":"Frank Schultz","bio":"Occupational Therapy/L at Bitterroot Rehab in Missoula, MT. Climber, cook, and occasional writer.","email":"frank.schultz@Finthesiss.ai"}

{"title":"Why I Became an Occupational Therapist","slug":"why-i-became-an-Occupational Therapy","body":"A reflection on my path from pre-med to Occupational Therapy school and what drew me to work with chronic pain group populations in Montana.","author":"author-frank","tags":["Occupational Therapy","career","reflection"]}

{"title":"Pacing: The Skill chronic pain group Readers Actually Need","slug":"pacing-for-chronic-pain","body":"Activity pacing is one of the most underutilized tools in chronic pain group management. Here's how I teach it at Bitterroot Rehab.","author":"author-frank","tags":["chronic-pain","pacing","occupational-therapy-education"]}

{"title":"Climbing as Occupational Therapy (For Me)","slug":"climbing-as-Occupational Therapy","body":"I've started to realize that my bouldering practice actually teaches me what I try to teach participants: tolerance, pacing, and trusting the process.","author":"author-frank","tags":["climbing","Occupational Therapy","self-care"]}

{"title":"McKinnon: Sesame Soba Noodles with Crispy Tofu (p.188)","rating":"5","notes":"Used tamari instead of soy sauce. Soba cooked 1 min less than package says. Will repeat at cook night. Rowan rated 4.5.","tags":["mcKinnon","noodles","tofu","vegetarian"]}

{"title":"McKinnon: Miso-Glazed Eggplant (p.94)","rating":"4","notes":"Broil at 500 not 450 for better char. Doubled the miso glaze. Rowan loved it. 4/5 overall.","tags":["mcKinnon","eggplant","miso","vegetarian"]}

{"title":"V4 Overhang Right - Crux 2 Matched","date":"2026-03-03","grade":"V4","gym_crag":"Missoula Climbing Gym","notes":"Matched the second crux hold finally. Both crux holds now isolated. Next session: try to link crux 1 and 2. Left sidepull pinch needs to be more active.","tags":["bouldering","project","v4"]}

{"title":"V3 The Prow - Flash","date":"2026-03-09","grade":"V3","gym_crag":"Missoula Climbing Gym","notes":"Flashed it clean on the first go. New setter problem. Good foutwork on the sloper finish.","tags":["bouldering","flash","v3"]}

{"title":"Understanding Occupational Therapy for chronic pain group","slug":"occupational-therapy-chronic-pain-overview","body":"A plain-language overview of how Occupational Therapy helps people with chronic pain group return to meaningful daily activities.","tags":["chronic-pain","occupational-therapy-education","participant-resource"]}

{"title":"Planning: Glacier NP Cabin Dec 18-20","notes":"Cabin booked. Rowan and Jude tentatively confirmed. Need packing list and activity plan. Possible snowshoe day.","tags":["glacier","winter","trip-planning"]}

{"title":"Cook Night May 2026 - Sasha's Thai Basil Chicken","date":"2026-03-15","rating":"4.5","notes":"Sasha brought the heat - literally and figuratively. More fish sauce next time. Jasmine rice was the move. Sasha's mango sticky rice was a crowd pleaser for dessert.","tags":["cook-night","thai","sasha"]}

{"title":"Week of June 2 - Projects and Summer Rhythm","notes":"Good week. Projected on the V4 three times. Lentil soup recipe queued for this weekend. Glacier trip is locked. Life feels settled.","tags":["reflection","weekly"]}

{"title":"Black Diamond C4 Camalots - Two Season Review","gear":"Black Diamond C4 Camalot Set","rating":"5","notes":"Absolutely reliable. Smooth trigger action even in cold weather. Sold the set to fund an upgrade - no regrets on the cams, just sizing up.","tags":["gear","trad-climbing","camalots"]}

{"title":"Bozeman Hand Therapy CEU - Pre-Course Prep Notes","course":"Hand Therapy Intensive - MSU Bozeman Nov 2026","notes":"Reading chapters 1-3 on tendon gliding protocols and post-surgical rehab timelines. This is the gap in my practice I've been wanting to close.","tags":["htcc","hand-therapy","ceu"]}

{"title":"Missoula Climbing Gym - Wall Beta Guide","location":"Missoula Climbing Gym, Missoula MT","notes":"The overhang wall sets rotate monthly. The slab corner on the left side tends to keep holds longer. Best session times: weekday mornings before 9am or Tuesday evenings.","tags":["missoula","gym-climbing","bouldering"]}

{"title":"What Montana Teaches You About Rest","slug":"montana-and-rest","body":"Living in Missoula with the seasons so present, I've learned to pace myself with the land. This winter felt different - quieter, more intentional.","author":"author-frank","tags":["montana","reflection","rest"]}

{"title":"Review: Explain Pain by Butler and Moseley","rating":"5","notes":"Required reading for anyone treating chronic pain group. The neuroplasticity chapter is something I quote in sessions weekly. Highly recommend for OTs and PTs.","tags":["chronic-pain","book","pain-science"]}

{"title":"Occupational Therapy Flourish Podcast - Ep 88: Hand Therapy Career Paths","source":"Occupational Therapy Flourish Podcast","notes":"Great episode on the HTCC path. Resonated with the point about finding a mentor early. Makes me appreciate Dr. Tran's role in my development.","tags":["podcast","hand-therapy","htcc"]}

{"title":"McKinnon: Spiced Red Lentil Soup (p.142) - Prep Notes","rating":"","notes":"Have all ingredients. Plan to make June 20. Adding extra cumin and skipping the yogurt topping (Rowan is dairy-free). Could be a cook night candidate.","tags":["mcKinnon","lentil","soup","planned"]}
